revision.text: {{#if:{{yesno|{{{sandboxlinks|no}}}|yes=yes|no=}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|_}}} |pattern=%/sandbox%d*$ |plain=false |nomatch=no}}|no||yes2}}|{{T links/sandbox links|1={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|_}}} |pattern=%/sandbox%d*$ |plain=false |replace=}} |sandboxname={{{sandboxname|sandbox}}} |module={{{module|}}} }}|{{[[:Template:{{{1|Example}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}]]}} ([{{fullurl:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}|action=edit}} edit] [[Template talk:{{{1|Example}}}|talk]] [{{fullurl:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}|action=history}} history] [{{fullurl:Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}|limit=999}} links] [https://tools.wmflabs.org/templatecount/index.php?lang=en&namespace=10&name={{urlencode:{{{1|}}}}} #] [{{fullurl:Special:PrefixIndex/Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}/}} /subpages] [[Template:{{{1|Example}}}/doc|/doc]] [{{fullurl:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}/doc|action=edit}} /doc edit] [[Template:{{{1|Example}}}/{{{sandboxname|sandbox}}}|/sbox]] [{{fullurl:Special:ComparePages|page1={{urlencode:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}}}&page2={{urlencode:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}/{{{sandboxname|sandbox}}}}}}} /sbox diff] [[Template:{{{1|Example}}}/testcases|/test]])}}{{#if:{{{module|}}}| {{#ifeq:{{{module|}}}|no||{{middot}}[[Module:{{{module|}}}]]|{{#ifexist:Module:{{{1|}}}|{{middot}}[[Module:{{{1|}}}]]}}}}|}} {{yesno|1={{{tpu|}}}{{{TPU|}}}|yes={{template parameter usage|1={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|_}}} |pattern=%/sandbox%d*$ |plain=false |replace=}} |label=TPU}}}}{{documentation}}

{{#if:{{yesno|{{{sandboxlinks|no}}}|yes=yes|no=}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1|_}}} |pattern=%/sandbox%d*$ |plain=false |nomatch=no}}|no||yes2}}|{{T links/sandbox links|1={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|_}}} |pattern=%/sandbox%d*$ |plain=false |replace=}} |sandboxname={{{sandboxname|sandbox}}} |module={{{module|}}} }}|{{[[:Template:{{{1|Example}}}|{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}]]}} ([{{fullurl:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}|action=edit}} edit] [[Template talk:{{{1|Example}}}|talk]] [{{fullurl:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}|action=history}} history] [{{fullurl:Special:Whatlinkshere/Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}|limit=999}} links] [https://tools.wmflabs.org/templatecount/index.php?lang=en&namespace=10&name={{urlencode:{{{1|}}}}} #] [{{fullurl:Special:PrefixIndex/Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}/}} /subpages] [[Template:{{{1|Example}}}/doc|/doc]] [{{fullurl:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}/doc|action=edit}} /doc edit] [[Template:{{{1|Example}}}/{{{sandboxname|sandbox}}}|/sbox]] [{{fullurl:Special:ComparePages|page1={{urlencode:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}}}&page2={{urlencode:Template:{{ucfirst:{{{1|Example}}}}}/{{{sandboxname|sandbox}}}}}}} /sbox diff] [[Template:{{{1|Example}}}/testcases|/test]])}}{{#if:{{{module|}}}| {{#ifeq:{{{module|}}}|no||{{middot}}[[Module:{{{module|}}}]]|{{#ifexist:Module:{{{1|}}}|{{middot}}[[Module:{{{1|}}}]]}}}}|}} {{yesno|1={{{tpu|}}}{{{TPU|}}}|yes={{template parameter usage|1={{#invoke:String|replace|source={{{1|_}}} |pattern=%/sandbox%d*$ |plain=false |replace=}} |label=TPU}}}}{{documentation}}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: reimporting these to fix older errors
